description: Validates that the pipeline correctly handles various complex language scripts (RTL, etc.) in both static content and dynamic interpolations without corruption.

assertNodes.description: Static Arabic (RTL) text should be preserved.
Static Hebrew (RTL) text should be preserved.
Static Thai text should be preserved.

assert.textContent: สวัสดีชาวโลก

assertNodes.description: Dynamic Arabic text should be correctly typed.
Dynamic Hebrew text should be correctly typed.
Dynamic Thai text should be correctly typed.
Dynamic Georgian text should be correctly typed.
